name: io.github.sergii-ziborov/weavatrix
description: Code graph & blast-radius MCP server: change impact, transitive dependents, health audit, clone detection (incl. semantic name-twins and string-literal templates), coverage mapping over any local repository. Local-first; JS/TS/Python/Go/Java/C#/Rust.

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the repository to analyze (the graph location is derived automatically; open_repo can retarget any other repo later)
